page.title: Marbella Pride 2028: Yacht Charter for the Ultimate Celebration

data.meta_description: Book a Marbella Pride 2028 yacht charter from Puerto Banús. Celebrate with style on our fleet — from €749/2h. Inclusions: skipper, drinks, snacks & IVA.
data.summary: Marbs Pride 2028 is the ultimate celebration on the Costa del Sol. Our yacht charter fleet departs from Puerto Banús and offers everything from intimate speedboats to superyachts, all with licensed skipper, drinks, snacks and IVA included.
key_facts: All charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella.
Fleet includes 18 boats — from 5-pax speedboats to 12-pax superyachts.
Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749/2h to €2,299/8h.
Tier B Mangusta 80 (incl. white/grey) from €4,719 minimum 4h, with free jet ski.
Every charter includes licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance & IVA.
Pride 2028 dates: late June 2028 (exact calendar TBC by Marbella Town Hall).
Ideal for weddings, hen/stag parties, or just sailing with friends.

faq.a: Marbella Pride typically takes place in the last weekend of June. For 2028, the exact dates will be confirmed by the Marbella Town Hall around spring 2028. The celebrations include parades, concerts, beach parties, and a vibrant atmosphere across the Golden Mile and Puerto Banús.

faq.q: Which boats are best for a Pride group charter?
faq.a: For groups up to 12, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) or Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) offer plenty of space and sun decks. For smaller groups, the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) or the Fairline Targa 12m (12m, 10 pax) are excellent. All depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden costs. For Tier B boats (Mangusta 80), a jet ski is also included free of charge for the minimum 4-hour booking.

faq.q: Can we bring our own decorations or music?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring decorations such as flags, banners, or rainbow bunting. Most boats have Bluetooth or AUX audio systems so you can play your own playlist. Please avoid anything that could damage the upholstery or leave sticky residues.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on our Pride charter day?
faq.a: Safety is our priority. If the skipper deems conditions unsafe, we will reschedule your charter to a suitable date or offer a full refund. The Costa del Sol enjoys over 300 sunny days a year, so cancellations are rare, especially in June.

faq.q: Is it possible to book a private chef or extra catering?
faq.a: Yes, we can arrange a private chef or upgraded catering on request for many of our yachts, particularly the larger models like the Ferretti 94 or Mangusta 80. Please contact us via WhatsApp to discuss options and pricing.

faq.q: How do I book a yacht for Marbella Pride 2028?
faq.a: You can book directly through our website or contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing on boats not listed with fixed rates. Early booking is recommended as Pride weekend is very popular. All charters depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: What is the minimum age to charter a boat?
faq.a: There is no minimum age to be a passenger, but the lead booker must be at least 18 years old. For groups with minors, the skipper will provide life jackets and safety briefings. Alcohol is only served to adults aged 18+.

data.body_html:
Marbella Pride 2028 is set to be the Costa del Sol's most colourful celebration, and there's no better way to experience it than from the deck of a private yacht. Our fleet of 18 boats — from speedy 5-pax runabouts to 12-pax superyachts — departs directly from Puerto Banús, putting you in the heart of the action. Whether you're planning a hen party, a group of friends, or a romantic escape, a Marbella Pride 2028 yacht charter offers freedom, luxury, and total privacy. All charters include a licensed skipper, drinks, snacks, insurance, and IVA — no surprises.

Why Choose a Yacht for Pride 2028?

Pride in Marbella is a week-long explosion of parades, beach parties, and nightlife. A private yacht gives you a floating VIP lounge where you can dance, sunbathe, and toast with cava while watching the coast unfold. You avoid crowded beaches and queues at bars. Instead, you anchor at secluded coves like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés, or cruise past the mansions of the Golden Mile. With the skipper handling everything, you just bring your playlist and your best rainbow gear.

Our Fleet for Pride Celebrations

We offer a wide range of boats, all based at Puerto Banús. Here's a quick overview of what's available:

BoatLengthMax PaxPrice From
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749/2h
Azimut 3912.5m11€749/2h
Mangusta 80 (White/Grey)24m12€4,719/4h
Azimut 58 Flybridge17.6m12On request
Ferretti 9429m12On request
Speedboat7m6On request

For full details on all 18 boats, visit our Marbella boat rental hub.

What's Included in Your Charter

Every booking includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). For Tier B boats (Mangusta 80), a jet ski is included free for the minimum 4-hour charter. No hidden extras — just show up and celebrate.

Popular Itineraries for Pride Week

Most Pride charters head west towards Estepona or east to Cabopino, with stops for swimming at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés. You can also cruise past the Río Verde mansions and the La Concha mountain backdrop. For a longer trip, Sotogrande is about 30 NM away — perfect for a full-day charter. Your skipper will tailor the route to your group's wishes.

Book Early for Marbella Pride 2028

Pride weekend is one of the busiest of the year in Puerto Banús. Boats book up weeks in advance. Secure your Marbella Pride 2028 yacht charter now to guarantee your preferred boat and time slot. For boats with fixed pricing (Tier A and Tier B), you can book directly online. For all others, contact us via WhatsApp for a personalised quote. Check out our full guide to celebrating Pride on a yacht for more ideas.

Frequently asked questions

When is Marbella Pride 2028?

Marbella Pride typically takes place in the last weekend of June. For 2028, the exact dates will be confirmed by the Marbella Town Hall around spring 2028. The celebrations include parades, concerts, beach parties, and a vibrant atmosphere across the Golden Mile and Puerto Banús.

Which boats are best for a Pride group charter?

For groups up to 12, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) or Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) offer plenty of space and sun decks. For smaller groups, the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) or the Fairline Targa 12m (12m, 10 pax) are excellent. All depart from Puerto Banús.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden costs. For Tier B boats (Mangusta 80), a jet ski is also included free of charge for the minimum 4-hour booking.

Can we bring our own decorations or music?

Yes, you are welcome to bring decorations such as flags, banners, or rainbow bunting. Most boats have Bluetooth or AUX audio systems so you can play your own playlist. Please avoid anything that could damage the upholstery or leave sticky residues.

What happens if the weather is bad on our Pride charter day?

Safety is our priority. If the skipper deems conditions unsafe, we will reschedule your charter to a suitable date or offer a full refund. The Costa del Sol enjoys over 300 sunny days a year, so cancellations are rare, especially in June.

Is it possible to book a private chef or extra catering?

Yes, we can arrange a private chef or upgraded catering on request for many of our yachts, particularly the larger models like the Ferretti 94 or Mangusta 80. Please contact us via WhatsApp to discuss options and pricing.

How do I book a yacht for Marbella Pride 2028?

You can book directly through our website or contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing on boats not listed with fixed rates. Early booking is recommended as Pride weekend is very popular. All charters depart from Puerto Banús.

What is the minimum age to charter a boat?

There is no minimum age to be a passenger, but the lead booker must be at least 18 years old. For groups with minors, the skipper will provide life jackets and safety briefings. Alcohol is only served to adults aged 18+.
